description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Collect four green-highlighted words from the earliest Prelude-tagged transmission logs and submit them together as a passphrase to unlock a Phase I teaser.

tasks.instruction: On the timeline, filter to glitch-type events between 1999 and 2020 with severity 3 or higher, sort by oldest first, and add the earliest one to your watchlist.

tasks.instruction: In the character directory, filter profiles to those linked to 'Project Orion', sort them alphabetically, compare the first two results, and set the one with the higher Anomaly Index as your Primary Contact.

tasks.instruction: On the anomaly map, filter to active European locations with anomaly level 4–5 only, sort the list by highest anomaly level, and add the top three results to a new case file named 'Europe Level 4+ Sweep'.

tasks.instruction: Complete the recruitment form as a Field Investigator based in North America with low risk tolerance, weekly contact frequency, codename 'Observer-17', and email 'observer17@example.com', then submit it.

tasks.instruction: In the incident logs, search for 'mirror', filter results to threat levels 1–2 within the 2024 calendar year, sort by lowest threat level first, and add the first three entries to your reading queue.

target_names: Mirror Flicker in Locker Room C

tasks.instruction: From the Signals stream, take the top two signals from the last 7 days, add any one medium-difficulty cipher, and use exactly those three clues to create a new theory titled 'Signal Reflection' on your theory board.

tasks.instruction: In the artifacts catalog, filter to items with origin set to Unknown and corruption risk 40 or below, sort by highest corruption risk, and set the first five results to High priority using bulk actions.
